final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: product shot, editorial jewelry photography
Primary request: extreme close-up of a sapphire ring with diamond pavé setting, capturing internal fire and brilliance
Scene/backdrop: black velvet background, seamless and non-reflective
Subject: oval-cut deep blue sapphire center stone, surrounded by brilliant-cut diamond halo, platinum or white gold band
Style/medium: hyper-realistic macro photography, commercial jewelry catalog style
Composition/framing: macro close-up, 90mm macro lens, shallow depth of field focusing on the sapphire's crown facets
Lighting/mood: controlled studio lighting with focused spotlight, creating internal refraction and fire (rainbow dispersion) within the sapphire, dramatic and luxurious
Color palette: deep royal blue + icy white diamond sparkle + warm gold/platinum metal tones against pure black
Materials/textures: faceted sapphire with visible internal clarity and dispersion, crisp diamond facets, soft matte velvet texture
Constraints: must show fire/refraction inside the sapphire gemstone, every facet and inclusion detail visible, black velvet must appear rich and non-reflective
Avoid: plastic-looking gems, flat lighting without refraction, over-sharpening artifacts, dust or fingerprints on the stone, washed-out colors
